name: HRM-9
note: Off-Meta MW3 SMG (9mm, 882 RPM). MUZZLE(41)=universal MW-Pool (Guard-skip). FIRE MODS-Slot zeigte stale .45 ACP (Phantom-Slot bei MW-Waffen, AMMUNITION=9mm) -> ausgeschlossen.
extraction: weapon-specific-only (MW: MUZZLE universal; FIRE MODS Phantom excl.)

9mm Hardened Rounds :: -26% Range | -15% Bullet Velocity | +2% Gun Kick | +4% Horiz. Recoil | +4% Vert. Recoil
9mm High Velocity :: +30% Bullet Velocity | +5% Horiz. Recoil | +5% Vert. Recoil

Princeps Long Barrel :: +26.7% Range | +30% Bullet Velocity | -30% Idle Sway | +30% Max Hipfire | -7% ADS Move | +5% Sprint to Fire
Taciturn-7 Suppressed Barrel :: -13.7% Range | -15% Bullet Velocity | -5% Gun Kick | -12% Horiz. Recoil | -12% Vert. Recoil
MAGAZINE: 20 Round Mag :: +2% Move | +2% Crouch | +2% Sprint | +6% ADS Move | -8% ADS Time | -16% Reload | -15% Sprint to Fire
50 Round Drum :: -5% Move | -5% Crouch | -2% Sprint | -5% ADS Move | +11% ADS Time | +12% Reload
